headline: 3 Stocks Turn $10,000 Into $53,314 In 3 Months
summary: March was a big disappointment for most S&P 500 investors. But some stocks not only avoided much of the pain — they thrived.

headline: Top 2 Energy That May Collapse This Month
summary: Energy sector stocks flashing warning to investors who value momentum. RSI indicator compares stock strength on up/down days. APA and EOG highly overbought.

headline: Is APA Corporation (APA) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is APA a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on APA Corporation on Indirect Costs’s Substack by Nemčik. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on APA. APA Corporation’s share was trading at $40.80 as of March 24th. APA’s trailing and forward P/E were 9.80 and 17.86 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. APA Corporation, an independent […]
